---
title: "Naples Tickets & Booking"
subtitle: "Days 8–9 · June 12–13"
categories: [planning, naples, tickets]
toc: true
---

Naples museums require advance booking — Cappella Sansevero especially, as its tiny chapel has very limited timed entry slots. Book it the moment your travel dates are set.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Refreshing this data

Run `python3 scripts/ticket_agent.py` from the project root to re-scrape all booking pages, then re-render the site to update these pages.
:::

{{< include tickets-naples.md >}}
